title: Titan Series Plus™ European Plywood Folding Table - 8' x 48'' banquet
features: When you're ready to enhance your party rental company or event venue inventory, take a look at our latest addition: the Titan Series Plus™ 8' x 48'' "King" Banquet European Plywood Folding Table from EventStable.
These tables are meticulously crafted from 13-layer plywood, boasting a sturdy ¾ inch thickness for exceptional durability.
What makes these tables stand out?
We've taken extra measures to ensure longevity and resilience.

Each table undergoes a meticulous process where a light brown protective stain is applied and triple-sealed on both the top and bottom surfaces, providing unparalleled defense against scratches, spills, and general wear and tear.
Even the edges are sealed prior to the application of vinyl or metal edging, offering comprehensive protection from all angles.
In addition to their durability, these tables also exude style and strength.
Featuring 16-gauge powder-coated steel tubing legs in a classic wishbone design, they offer both stability and aesthetic appeal.
The wishbone design not only enhances stability but also prevents guests from bumping their knees, ensuring comfort throughout your event.
Moreover, each leg is equipped with a vinyl floor glide, safeguarding your floors against scratches and damage.
Best of all, these tables will ship free when you order 10 or more, or in combination with thousands of other event products in orders of $5000 or more.
Whether you're hosting weddings, parties, conferences, or trade shows, these plywood folding tables are a long-term investment you can rely on seasons to come
